watch.note: AI long. BUY-ZONE $470-490 on a pullback (fractional ~$40, never the gap). POSITION INTO Advancing AI 7/22-23; trim BEFORE the event (sell-the-news risk). PT chatter $560-665.
Merger re-rate. DOJ cleared $110B WBD deal. Defined-risk Aug $11/$12 call (Timeout). Catalysts: EU 7/7 + 7/14. Weekly-sleeve candidate, uncorrelated to the book.
WATCH ONLY. Record contracts (~$10B/2wks) but tape rejects them; peace = headwind; $540 too big for the account. Re-look only if peace collapses (then ITA, not LMT).

briefs.body: US-Iran deal reached; formal signing ceremony Thu 6/19 (Switzerland). Oil sanctions lifted + Hormuz reopens within 30 days = oil down, inflation relief, RISK-ON. Book gapped green Sunday night (INTC +3.6%, RGTI +5.4%, HOOD +3.6%, NVDA +2.3%, AMD +4.5%). Energy stays BANNED - oil is the loser here.

Bought 1 contract @ $0.58 ($58, max risk = premium). Merger re-rate play, UNCORRELATED to the Fed. $12 strike needs PSKY >$12 (+15%) for intrinsic value - leaning on a clean EU approval to re-rate the stock. Catalysts: WBD tender 7/1, EU merger 7/7, EU subsidy 7/14. TP $1.15-1.45 into a clean-EU pop; CUT -50% (~$0.29) or on a deal-block / EU-Phase-2 headline; manage around the July dates. (AAL $16C sold 6/15 +51%.)

Into a gap-up we protect gains, we do not chase. New stops: HOOD $90 (was 86.75), INTC $122 (was 114.25), RGTI $20.60 breakeven (was 19.00), NVDA $200 (was 189), NU $11.50 (was 10.95), SOFI $15.15 hold. SPY core never auto-sold. These are regular-hours levels; Sunday-night gaps can fade at the open.

Tracking AMD (~$534, +4.5% Sun night). BofA target $560, named top CPU pick; Meta 6GW / MI450 deal; UK 2B-pound AI infra. Big catalyst: Advancing AI event 7/22-23. Too expensive for options at this account; expression = small FRACTIONAL starter on a PULLBACK, never the gap. No chase.

Paramount Skydance ~$10.47. DOJ cleared the $110B Warner Bros deal with no conditions. Next catalysts: EU merger decision 7/7, EU foreign-subsidy decision 7/14 (the ~$24B Gulf funding = wildcard). Cheap + optionable = weekly-sleeve candidate; defined-risk Aug $11/$12 call into the July dates, Timeout to size. Uncorrelated to the war book.
Main mid-week card. 2nd $75 SPY core tranche planned AFTER the statement. No new options pre-FOMC unless AAL exits first.
